lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਹੀ ਸਭ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਰਵਿਆ ਸਭ ਵਣਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: hukame hee sabh saajeean raviaa sabh van trin |
lines.english: By the Hukam of His Command, He creates everything; He pervades and permeates all the woods and meadows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣਾ ਆਨੇਰੁ ਬਿਨਾਸਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee ghatt chaananaa aaner binaasan |
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, one's heart is illumined, and the darkness is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਹੀ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਈ ਸਚੈ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sabade hee sojhee pee sachai aap bujhaaee |5|
lines.english: Through the Shabad, understanding comes; the True Lord Himself inspires us to understand. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh aape aap hai guramukh sadaa har bhan |
lines.english: He Himself is everything; the Gurmukh constantly chants the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਦੈ ਦਿਤੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਤੇਹੋ ਜੇਹਾ ਧਰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis dai ditai naanakaa teho jehaa dharam |
lines.english: Donations to him bring proportionate rewards.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਭਿਆਗਤ ਏਹਿ ਨ ਆਖੀਅਨਿ ਜਿਨ ਕੇ ਚਿਤ ਮਹਿ ਭਰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: abhiaagat ehi na aakheean jin ke chit meh bharam |
lines.english: He is not called a renunciate, whose consciousness is filled with doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਭੈ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਭੂਖਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: abhai niranjan param pad taa kaa bhookhaa hoe |
lines.english: He hungers for the supreme status of the Fearless, Immaculate Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਪਾਏ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis kaa bhojan naanakaa viralaa paae koe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, how rare are those who offer him this food. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਰੈ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਆਪਣੇ ਬਹਲੇ ਭੇਖ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: audarai kaaran aapane bahale bhekh karen |
lines.english: For the sake of their bellies, they wear various religious robes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਭਿਆਗਤ ਏਹਿ ਨ ਆਖੀਅਨਿ ਜਿ ਪਰ ਘਰਿ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: abhiaagat ehi na aakheean ji par ghar bhojan karen |
lines.english: They are not called renunciates, who take food in the homes of others.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਲਿ ਲਹਨਿ ਸਹੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਰਹਣੁ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhaal lehan sahu aapanaa nij ghar rehan karen |2|
lines.english: They seek and find their Husband Lord; they dwell within the home of their own inner self. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਭਿਆਗਤ ਸੇਈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿ ਆਤਮ ਗਉਣੁ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: abhiaagat seee naanakaa ji aatam gaun karen |
lines.english: They alone are renunciates, O Nanak, who enter into their own souls.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰੁ ਦਰੁ ਸਭੋ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ghar dar sabho sach hai jis vich sachaa naau |
lines.english: True are all those homes and gates, within which the True Name is enshrined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਬਰੁ ਧਰਤਿ ਵਿਛੋੜਿਅਨੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਚਾ ਅਸਰਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anbar dharat vichhorrian vich sachaa asaraau |
lines.english: They sky and the earth are separate, but the True Lord supports them from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਸਚਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabh sachaa hukam varatadaa guramukh sach samaau |
lines.english: The Hukam of the True Lord's Command is effective everywhere. The Gurmukh merges in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਆਪਿ ਤਖਤੁ ਸਚਾ ਬਹਿ ਸਚਾ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa aap takhat sachaa beh sachaa kare niaau |
lines.english: He Himself is True, and True is His throne. Seated upon it, He administers true justice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sabh sacho sach varatadaa guramukh alakh lakhaaee |6|
lines.english: The Truest of the True is all-pervading everywhere; the Gurmukh sees the unseen. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਾਇਰ ਮਾਹਿ ਅਨੰਤੁ ਹੈ ਕੂੜੀ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: rainaaeir maeh anant hai koorree aavai jaae |
lines.english: In the world-ocean, the Infinite Lord abides. The false come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਚਲੈ ਆਪਣੈ ਬਹੁਤੀ ਲਹੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanai chalai aapanai bahutee lahai sajaae |
lines.english: One who walks according to his own will, suffers terrible punishment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਾਇਰ ਮਹਿ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੈ ਕਰਮੀ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: rainaaeir meh sabh kichh hai karamee palai paae |
lines.english: All things are in the world-ocean, but they are obtained only by the karma of good actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਓ ਵਿਚਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਨਮਿ ਬਿਨਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje satigur na sevio vich haumai janam binaas |
lines.english: One who doesn't intuitively serve the True Guru, loses his life in egotism.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਜੇ ਚਲੈ ਤਿਸੈ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak nau nidh paaeeai je chalai tisai rajaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone obtains the nine treasures, who walks in the Will of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਨ ਚਖਿਓ ਕਮਲੁ ਨ ਹੋਇਓ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa har ras na chakhio kamal na hoeo paragaas |
lines.english: His tongue does not taste the sublime essence of the Lord, and his heart-lotus does not blossom forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਧੀ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਮੁਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਣਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: bikh khaadhee manamukh muaa maaeaa mohi vinaas |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh eats poison and dies; he is ruined by love and attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਚਾ ਤਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa aape nadar kare prabh sachaa taa hovai daasan daas |
lines.english: When God Himself bestows His Glance of Grace, then one becomes the slave of His slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਣੁ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: eikas har ke naam vin dhrig jeevan dhrig vaas |
lines.english: Without the Name of the One Lord, his life is cursed, and his home is cursed as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਕੀ ਕਬਹਿ ਨ ਛੋਡੈ ਪਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: taa anadin sevaa kare satiguroo kee kabeh na chhoddai paas |
lines.english: And then, night and day, he serves the True Guru, and never leaves His side.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਮਹਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਅਲਿਪਤੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਤਿਉ ਵਿਚੇ ਗਿਰਹ ਉਦਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jal meh kamal alipato varatai tiau viche girah udaas |
lines.english: As the lotus flower floats unaffected in the water, so does he remain detached in his own household.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਇਆ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kare karaaeaa sabh ko jiau bhaavai tiv har gunataas |2|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, the Lord acts, and inspires everyone to act, according to the Pleasure of His Will. He is the treasure of virtue. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਤੀਹ ਜੁਗ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ਸਾ ਆਪੇ ਗਣਤ ਕੀਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: chhateeh jug gubaar saa aape ganat keenee |
lines.english: For thirty-six ages, there was utter darkness. Then, the Lord revealed Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਭ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਆਪਿ ਮਤਿ ਦੀਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: aape srisatt sabh saajeean aap mat deenee |
lines.english: He Himself created the entire universe. He Himself blessed it with understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਸੋ ਬੁਝਸੀ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਤੀਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis bujhaae so bujhasee sachai sabad pateenee |
lines.english: He alone understands, whom the Lord inspires to understand and to be pleased with the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਾਸਤ ਸਾਜਿਅਨੁ ਪਾਪ ਪੁੰਨ ਗਣਤ ਗਣੀਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: simrit saasat saajian paap pun ganat ganeenee |
lines.english: He created the Simritees and the Shaastras; He calculates the accounts of virtue and vice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਭੋ ਰਤੁ ਹੈ ਰਤੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਤੰਨੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu tan sabho rat hai rat bin tan na hoe |
lines.english: This body is all blood; without blood, the body cannot exist.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sabh aape aap varatadaa aape bakhas milaaee |7|
lines.english: He Himself is all-pervading; He Himself forgives, and unites with Himself. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਹਿ ਰਤੇ ਆਪਣੈ ਤਿਨ ਤਨਿ ਲੋਭ ਰਤੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo seh rate aapanai tin tan lobh rat na hoe |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to their Lord - their bodies are not filled with the blood of greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਪਇਐ ਤਨੁ ਖੀਣੁ ਹੋਇ ਲੋਭ ਰਤੁ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai peiai tan kheen hoe lobh rat vichahu jaae |
lines.english: In the Fear of God, the body becomes thin, and the blood of greed passes out of the body.
